settings.title: Join and make an impact in the AI ​​industry.

settings.editor:
As part of our team, you’ll work in a dynamic environment, collaborate with industry experts, and contribute to shaping the future of AI learning.

Whether you're an educator, developer, or strategist, we offer exciting opportunities to grow your career while making a real impact.

settings.title: Grow your career & transform AI education.

settings.editor: Explore exciting career opportunities at Aicademy. We offer competitive salaries, flexible work schedules, and the chance to contribute to AI education worldwide.
Applying to Aicademy is quick and easy! Simply choose the role that fits your expertise, submit your application, and go through our interview process.

settings.description_text: Visit the Available Positions section and find a role that matches your skills and passion.
Send your resume, cover letter, and relevant certifications to careers@sandtrail.com
Shortlisted candidates will be invited for interviews and assessments tailored to the role.
